title: GPX Analysis
text: This project is now oriented around Quarto documents and dashboards rather than a custom browser app. The Python package remains the analysis layer; Quarto is the publishing layer.

title: GPX Analysis
text:
Working Model

GPX inputs live in gpx_data/.
Python scripts export route summaries and GeoJSON into quarto/data/.
Quarto pages read those static artifacts and render route notes, maps, and summary dashboards.

title: GPX Analysis
text:
Local Authoring Loop
$env:PYTHONPATH='.'
.\.venv\Scripts\python.exe scripts\build_quarto_data.py
quarto preview quarto
That keeps the data build separate from the document render, which is the right split for this repo.
